encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel unlocks the heavy iron doors to the inner corridor.

pickup.name: Bottled Solar Flare
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to shadow-based creatures

encounters.trigger: The echo shatters, revealing a hidden stairwell leading to the sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Choking darkness that drains player health
encounters.trigger: Inserting the relic into the altar summons the final boss from the shadows.

boss.name: Eclipse Lord Valerius
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero before he plunges the world into eternal darkness.

objective: Ascend the spire and extinguish the Eclipse Lord to restore sunlight to the realm.
